stemHtml: The effects of very heavy tropical rain on the aerodynamic characteristics of an aeroplane are:

options.a: increase of C<sub>LMAX</sub> and decrease of drag
options.b: increase of C<sub>LMAX</sub> and increase of drag.
options.c: decrease of C<sub>LMAX </sub>and increase of drag.
options.d: decrease of C<sub>LMAX</sub> and decrease of drag.
